text:
On Tue, 8 Jan 2013 07:55:21 -0800, Garrett Cooper writes:
>	Could you please make the latest version publicly accessible =
>(~/www)? I don't have a freefall account, so I can't access the tarball.

Done - since exp-run's are off the air, it would be good to get folk
testing http://people.freebsd.org/~sjg/ports2bmake.tar.gz
